Support
[What's new](https://www.ibm.com/new?lnk=flatitem)
  * [OverviewResolve product issues with self-service tools](https://www.ibm.com/mysupport/s/?language=en_US&lnk=flathl)
  * [CommunityShare knowledge in a collaborative environment to unlock innovation](https://community.ibm.com/community/user/community?lnk=flathl)
  * [DeveloperAccess digital resources, code samples and code trials](https://developer.ibm.com/?lnk=flathl)
  * [DocumentationUnderstand, develop and deploy our products with comprehensive technical resources](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en?lnk=flathl)
  * [IBM Cloud platformAccess subject matter experts and content to address questions and issues about IBM Cloud](https://www.ibm.com/products/cloud/support?lnk=flathl)
  * [ImplementationDrive better business outcomes with an experienced team of IBM product experts](https://www.ibm.com/products/expertlabs?lnk=flatitem)
  * [TrainingDevelop your skills with premiere educational offerings and credentials](https://www.ibm.com/training/?lnk=flathl)
  * [Technology Lifecycle ServicesElevate your support experience with a holistic approach to data center management across your IT environment](https://www.ibm.com/services/technology-lifecycle-services?lnk=flathl)


My IBM  Log in  Book a meeting
  1. [ Home ](https://www.ibm.com/)
  2. [ Services ](https://www.ibm.com/services)
  3. Technology Lifecycle Services


#  Technology Lifecycle Services 
A single point of contact across the entire data center environment to accelerate your AI and hybrid cloud journeys
[ Need IT support?  ](https://www.ibm.com/mysupport/s/?language=en_US)
![An IT technician standing and working on a laptop in server room.](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/technology-lifecycle-services-leadspace-3168x1280?ts=1776933573474&dpr=off)
IDC report: How AI is reshaping enterprise networks 
A new research from IDC that maps the network modernization steps enterprises are taking to support AI in production 
[ Read the blog ](https://www.ibm.com/new/product-blog/new-idc-report-how-ai-is-reshaping-enterprise-networks)
##  Your trusted support and services partner 
IBM Technology Lifecycle Services offers a holistic approach to data center management with technical experts, powered by AI-driven insights, across your entire IT environment—from hardware and software to networking and security.
[ Read the solution brief ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/115dcc7d82b63564) [ IDC MarketScape ](https://www.ibm.com/account/reg/signup?formid=urx-51564)
Build resiliency 
Increase uptime with a one-stop IT support vendor, providing preventive and proactive maintenance through trusted AI and automation capabilities.
Increase security 
Protect your organization with connected infrastructure, a strategic approach to security and regulatory compliance.
Drive optimization 
Harmonize your infrastructure across hardware, software, networking and security; simplify IT complexity; and position your organization for sustainable growth.
Lower costs and reduce downtime 
Streamline support vendors to lower costs, reduce error resolutions and increase IT efficiency, freeing resources to focus on high-impact projects.
Supporting your IT journey 
##  Supporting your IT journey 
![IT Engineers standing and discussing technical problem in server room](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/adobestock_286399156?ts=1776933587475&dpr=off)
Servers and storage 
Support for [IBM Power®](https://www.ibm.com/products/power), [IBM Z®](https://www.ibm.com/products/z), [IBM LinuxONE](https://www.ibm.com/products/linuxone), [IBM Storage](https://www.ibm.com/solutions/storage) and third-party servers and storage.
[ Explore servers and storage  ](https://www.ibm.com/services/systems-support)
![Close-up view of person's hands typing on laptop with chatbot conversation illustration ](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/adobestock_521250684?ts=1776933590561&dpr=off)
Software 
Support for your IBM and third-party operating systems including SAP HANA, Microsoft, Oracle and more.
[ Explore software  ](https://www.ibm.com/services/software-support)
![Illustration of multiple squares interconnected with nodes and lines](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/illustration-interconnection_1x1?ts=1776933593041&dpr=off)
Enterprise network and security 
Support for IBM SAN, Cisco, Juniper, Palo Alto, F5, Checkpoint Technologies and more.
[ Explore enterprise network and security  ](https://www.ibm.com/services/networking-support)
##  AI and automation capabilities 
Using our AI and automation capabilities to offer you streamlined support services, enhancing efficiency and elevating the support experience.
[ On-demand webcast: IBM TLS - Harnessing AI & Automation for Exceptional Support Services  ](https://ibm.webcasts.com/starthere.jsp?ei=1724857&tp_key=ff589be425)
  1. Support Insights
  2. Support Insights
Support Insights 
  3. Call Home
Call Home 
  4. Support assistant 
Support assistant 
  5. Agent assist
Agent assist 


Dashboard provides insights and recommendations based on advanced analytics across multivendor IT infrastructures. 
**Inventory Management**
  * Reduce time spent on inventory management with automated multivendor infrastructure asset discovery, customized inventory views and exports, and support coverage and change analysis


**Risks and Recommendations**
  * Get ahead of potential security exposures with alerts for security vulnerabilities, IT environment risk scores and prescriptive recommendations for how to remediate potential issues


**Case Metrics**
  * Leverage support case history to identify patterns and hotspots impacting system availability


[ Explore more  ](https://www.ibm.com/products/support-insights)
![Illustration of a woman having a virtual conversation](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/watsonxassistant_features-agent-maximize_1x1_grey?ts=1776933602163&dpr=off)
Feature enables automated, secure communication between your systems and IBM Support. 
**Continuous Monitoring**
  * Provides real-time issue detection and proactive support for IBM servers, storage, and select x86 manufacturers, available 24/7/365  



**Automated Problem Resolution**
  * Automatically alerts IBM Support upon detecting a potential issue in your system
  * Resolved approximately 90% of events with automation within 2024  



**Easy Enablement**
  * Quick setup: Access the Virtual Assistant by clicking on the blue chat bot in the bottom right corner of the IBM Support page. Ask how to turn on Call Home for your system and get started today.


[ Learn more about Call Home  ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/137a1e24fedba76d)
Chatbot provides a conversational interface to handle common inquiries, providing quick responses and reducing wait times. 
**Rapid Technical Support**
  * Offers quick answers and guidance to common technical queries, available 24/7


**Expertise-Backed Service**
  * Trained by IBM support experts, leveraging the company's extensive IT knowledge base


**Efficient Issue Resolution**
  * Resolved 88% of client questions related to IBM Infrastructure through self-service in 2024
  * Access the Virtual Assistant below by clicking on the blue chat bot in the bottom right corner of the IBM Support page


[ Visit my support  ](https://www.ibm.com/mysupport/s/?language=en_US)
![Illustration of an agent assisting virtually](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/watsonxassistant_assistant_agent-assistant_1x1?ts=1776933607975&dpr=off)
AI assistant provides recommended solutions to IBM support agents, speeding time to resolution. 
**AI-enhanced Customer Service**
  * Utilizes WatsonX technology for real-time agent support during case resolution


**Enhanced Efficiency & Accuracy**
  * Provides relevant information, responses, and troubleshooting steps to optimize support agent performance  



**Improved Resolution Times**
  * Fully correct solution recommendations by Remote Technical Support (RTS) Agent Assist resulted in average of 33% improvement in time to solution over a recent 12-month period

##  By the numbers
13K 
Global team of 13k support specialist that hold 5k certifications in total.
140 
IBM provides access to a high level of technicians in more than 140 countries and 40 languages.
11K 
Supported IBM and other OEM hardware and software product types.
35+ 
years experience providing multivendor maintenance and support.
##  What our clients are saying 
[ ![3D render of multiple digital cubes](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/adobestock_620080258?ts=1776933626315&dpr=off) Vodafone partners with IBM to enhance support for Turkish Customers  Experience a partnership designed to enhance support, resolve complex issues, and improve efficiency across your Microsoft environments ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/131cf878bbb313e7)
[ ![3D render of interior of spacious futuristic room with black tiled floor and bright neon illumination on walls](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/adobestock_594715939?ts=1776933627411&dpr=off) W&W Gruppe partners with IBM to meet regulatory compliance  As regulations evolve, IBM TLS can help clients navigate compliance landscapes through Project Services, offering expert guidance, tailored solutions, and risk management strategies. ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/137a3e3517bed57f)
[ ![3D render of a light-made security padlock on electronic circuit.](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/mf3d_june_04_001?ts=1776933628477&dpr=off) Reduces operational costs and improves networking productivity  See the benefits that Santander is achieving with IBM Managed Maintenance Solution for Network and Security. ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/10c31775c654006c)
[ ![A person sitting in front of a screen and analyzing data.](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/security-products-leadspace-arabic?ts=1776933629544&dpr=off) Significantly reduces the burden on IT operations  Read about how Josefs-Gesellschaft partners with IBM for Cisco support to focus on what is central for their organization. ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/10a99803f2afd7b1)
[ ![An isometric illustration of IT infrastructure.](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/leadspace-isometric-ITIhome?ts=1776933630582&dpr=off) Maintains reliability and security of IT infrastructure  Explore how IBM provided reliable support and maintenance on IBM Storage and IBM Power for the Technical University of Munich. ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/10a99803f3afd808)
[ ![Tech support team brainstorming in front of a "AI" logo](https://assets.ibm.com/is/image/ibm/adobestock_750235799?ts=1776933631594&dpr=off) Reduces complexity and improves clarity and visibility into enterprise networking  Discover the role that IBM Support Insights and IBM Managed Maintenance Solution for Network and Security played for this municipality. ](https://www.ibm.com/downloads/documents/us-en/107a02e95ac8f5bd)
Take the next step
Our IBM experts are ready to help you make the most of single-source managed services for your technology and business operations. Schedule a 30-minute, no-cost strategy session today.
